name: pi-hooks
description: YAML hook automation for the PI coding agent: tool guards, session hooks, prompts, notifications, and bash actions.

scripts.build:
tsc && mkdir -p dist/extensions && printf 'export { default } from "../index.js";
' > dist/extensions/index.js
scripts.test: npm run build && node dist/pi/unsupported.test.js && node dist/pi/ux-actions.test.js && node dist/pi/config-paths.test.js && node dist/pi/logger.test.js && node dist/pi/logging.test.js && node dist/pi/adapter.test.js && node dist/core/bash-executor.test.js && node dist/core/load-hooks-composition.test.js && node dist/core/runtime-paths.test.js && node dist/core/runtime-async.test.js
